mapper.sql: pa.id, pa.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, pa.current_role, pa.target_role, pa.reason, pa.status, pa.reviewer_id, reviewer.real_name AS reviewer_name, pa.review_comment, pa.create_time, pa.update_time, pa.review_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission_application (user_id, current_role, target_role, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{currentRole}, #{targetRole}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM permission_application pa LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pa.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON pa.reviewer_id = reviewer.id WHERE pa.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM permission_application pa LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pa.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON pa.reviewer_id = reviewer.id WHERE pa.user_id = #{userId} AND pa.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM permission_application pa LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pa.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user reviewer ON pa.reviewer_id = reviewer.id WHERE pa.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE permission_application SET status = #{status}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
